items.title: SMOTE — Original paper
items.author: Nitesh V. Chawla et al.
items.note: Introduces synthetic minority oversampling — referenced here at usage level, not full theory.

items.title: PyTorch torchvision — Transformations
items.author: PyTorch team
items.note: Reference for RandomResizedCrop, ColorJitter, and train vs eval transform patterns.

items.title: imbalanced-learn — SMOTE user guide
items.author: imbalanced-learn developers
items.note: Shows fit_resample on training data only; pair with proper cross-validation.

items.title: TensorFlow — Image data augmentation
items.author: TensorFlow team
items.note: Tutorial on on-the-fly image augmentation and when to use sequential vs functional API.
